steps.title: Substitute h = 467.33 into the equation
steps.content:
Replace $h$ with the given value of 467.33 degrees Fahrenheit:
$$467.33 = \frac{9(v - 273.15)}{5} + 12$$

steps.title: Isolate the fraction containing v
steps.content:
Subtract 12 from both sides:
$$455.33 = \frac{9(v - 273.15)}{5}$$
Multiply both sides by 5:
$$2276.65 = 9(v - 273.15)$$
Divide both sides by 9:
$$v - 273.15 = \frac{2276.65}{9} = 252.961...$$

steps.title: Solve for v
steps.content:
Add 273.15 to both sides:
$$v = 252.961... + 273.15 = 526.1$$
The corresponding temperature is 526.1 kelvins.
